question: What are the three basic criteria for the evaluation of a computing system?
options: Functionality, Performance, and Cost
Reliability, Scalability, and Availability
Throughput, Latency, and Bandwidth
Security, Privacy, and Integrity

question: Match the following resource allocation concepts to their correct definitions.
options: Principles guiding decisions.
The means to implement policies.
Deciding how to allocate resources of a system.

correct_answers.C: Deciding how to allocate resources of a system.

question: Match the Cloud Resource Management (CRM) policies to their appropriate descriptions.
options: Prevent the system from accepting workload in violation of high-level system policies.
Allocate resources for individual activations of a service.
Distribute the workload evenly among the servers.
Minimization of energy consumption.
Ability to satisfy timing or other conditions specified by a Service Level Agreement.

correct_answers.A: Prevent the system from accepting workload in violation of high-level system policies.
correct_answers.B: Allocate resources for individual activations of a service.
correct_answers.C: Distribute the workload evenly among the servers.
correct_answers.E: Ability to satisfy timing or other conditions specified by a Service Level Agreement.

question: What constitutes the outputs in the control theory application to cloud resource management?
options: The resource allocations to the individual applications.
Sensors used to estimate relevant measures of performance.
The offered workload and the policies for admission control.
Dynamic thresholds based on time averages.
correct_answers: The resource allocations to the individual applications.

question: Which of the following are considered inputs in the control system applied to cloud resource management?
options: The offered workload
Policies for admission control
Energy optimization policies
Resource allocations to the individual applications
Sensors used to estimate relevant measures

question: In the structure of a cloud controller, what do the variables 'r' and 's' represent?
options: The weighting factors of the performance index.
The high and low thresholds for processor utilization.
The state feedback regarding the current state.
The external traffic disturbance.
correct_answers: The weighting factors of the performance index.

question: Which of the following components are part of the cloud controller structure?
options: Predictive filter
Optimal controller
Queuing dynamics
Workload generator
Power assignment

question: Match the types of controllers to their specific functions in design decisions.
options: Determine if additional resources are needed.
Arbitrate requests for resources and allocates the physical resources.

correct_answers.A: Determine if additional resources are needed.
correct_answers.B: Arbitrate requests for resources and allocates the physical resources.

question: When choosing between fine versus coarse control, what trade-off is made regarding system state parameters?
options: The accuracy of parameters is traded for the efficiency of implementation.
Throughput is traded for minimized turnaround time.
Cost is traded for improved functionality.
Energy optimization is traded for QoS guarantees.
correct_answers: The accuracy of parameters is traded for the efficiency of implementation.

question: According to the Proportional thresholding algorithm, when should the system request additional virtual machines?
options: When the average value of the CPU utilization over the current time slice exceeds the high threshold.
When the average value of the CPU utilization over the current time slice falls below the low threshold.
When the predictive filter forecasts an external traffic disturbance.
When a hard deadline is approaching.
correct_answers: When the average value of the CPU utilization over the current time slice exceeds the high threshold.

question: According to the Proportional thresholding algorithm, when should the system release a virtual machine?
options: When the average value of the CPU utilization over the current time slice falls below the low threshold.
When the average value of the CPU utilization over the current time slice exceeds the high threshold.
When the optimal controller receives state feedback.
When the batch system objective has been met.
correct_answers: When the average value of the CPU utilization over the current time slice falls below the low threshold.

question: What are the conclusions drawn from proportional thresholding regarding dynamic thresholds?
options: Dynamic thresholds perform better than static ones, and two thresholds are better than one.
Static thresholds perform better than dynamic ones, and one threshold is sufficient.
Dynamic thresholds perform equally to static ones, but one threshold is better.
Static thresholds and dynamic thresholds are incomparable in this algorithm.
correct_answers: Dynamic thresholds perform better than static ones, and two thresholds are better than one.

question: Which of the following are methods for coordinating power and performance management?
options: Use separate controllers/managers for the two objectives.
Use a joint utility function for power and performance.
Use a single threshold based on historical processor utilization.
Disable the predictive filter to save energy.
correct_answers: Use separate controllers/managers for the two objectives.
Use a joint utility function for power and performance.

question: What information is fed into the autonomous performance and power managers to ensure prescribed performance and energy optimization?
options: Performance and power data
Dynamic and static thresholds
Hard and soft deadlines
Workload generator outputs

question: At which of the following levels is cloud scheduling responsible for resource sharing?
options: A server can be shared among several virtual machines.
A virtual machine could support several applications.
An application may consist of multiple threads.
A user can be shared across multiple hardware nodes.
correct_answers: A server can be shared among several virtual machines.
A virtual machine could support several applications.
An application may consist of multiple threads.

question: Match the type of system to the objectives of its scheduler.
options: Maximize throughput and minimize turnaround time.
Meet the deadlines and be predictable.

correct_answers.A: Maximize throughput and minimize turnaround time.
correct_answers.B: Meet the deadlines and be predictable.

question: Which of the following are common algorithms used for best effort applications?
options: Round-robin
First-Come-First-Serve (FCFS)
Shortest-Job-First (SJF)
Priority algorithms
Proportional thresholding

question: Match the type of deadline to its characteristics.
options: Strict, with penalties, and expressed precisely as milliseconds or seconds.
More of a guideline, can be missed by fractions of units, and generally has no penalties.

correct_answers.A: Strict, with penalties, and expressed precisely as milliseconds or seconds.
correct_answers.B: More of a guideline, can be missed by fractions of units, and generally has no penalties.

question: What is a characteristic consequence of missing a soft deadline?
options: In general, there are no penalties.
Other tasks which depend on it are immediately failed.
The system terminates the virtual machine.
There are severe financial penalties.
correct_answers: In general, there are no penalties.

question: Which cloud resource management policy defines the ability to satisfy timing or other conditions specified by a Service Level Agreement?
options: Quality of service (QoS) guarantees
Energy optimization
Admission control
Load balancing
